zh.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond是Muircheartach Ó Briain King of Thomond和Éadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomond的兒子，於大約1315年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯。他於1350年與Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond是Muircheartach Ó Briain King of Thomond和Éadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomond的儿子，于大约1315年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯。他于1350年与Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

nameMeanings.name: Ó
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

nameMeanings.name: Briain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Brittain  .

variants.name: Brittain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Bretagne, Bretaign(e) ‘Brittany’. Some of the modern forms are from the Middle English Brytane, Brittan ‘Breton’; compare Breton .

en.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond was born about 1315, in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland as the son of Muircheartach Ó Briain King of Thomond and Éadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomond. He married Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond in 1350, in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in his hometown, and was buried in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond est né environ 1315, à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande, fils de Muircheartach Ó Briain King of Thomond et Éadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomond. Il a épousé Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond en 1350, à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond wurde um 1315 in Ennis, County Clare, Irland, als Sohn von Muircheartach Ó Briain King of Thomond und Éadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomond geboren. Er hat 1350 in Ennis, County Clare, Irland Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond è nato il circa 1315 nel Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda come figlio di Muircheartach Ó Briain King of Thomond e Éadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomond. Lui sposato Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond nel 1350, nel Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomondは約1315年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスでMuircheartach Ó Briain King of ThomondとÉadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomondの息子として生まれた。1350年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスでÚna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスエニス 1にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond(은)는 대략 1315년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에서 Muircheartach Ó Briain King of Thomond(와)과 Éadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomond의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1350년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에서 Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스 니스 1에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda filho de Muircheartach Ó Briain King of Thomond e Éadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomond. Ele casou-se com Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond em 1350, em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond родился около 1315 г. в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия. Его родителей звали Muircheartach Ó Briain King of Thomond и Éadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomond. Он женился на женщине по имени Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond в 1350 г. в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности эннис 1, эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond nació aproximadamente 1315, en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda como hijo de Muircheartach Ó Briain King of Thomond y Éadaoin Nic Gormáin Queen of Thomond. Se casó con Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond en 1350, en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.
